subcodes.first_line: In this day it is incumbent and obligatory upon all to render obedience unto the Command of God. Through His divine bounty, all must adorn themselves with the ornament of His laws [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز بر جمیع اطاعت امرالله لازم و واجبست باید کل بعنایت الهیه بطراز احکام
subcodes.subjects: @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @love of God, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God
